event_description: Server-side account creation — the reliable, unblockable copy of the signup conversion (the SPA sends this to GTM + the Meta Pixel only, so PostHog counts it once).
Server-side successful email/password authentication (the SPA keeps its login event for GTM only, so PostHog is not double-counted).
SaaS revenue — a Stripe subscription invoice was paid with money collected; captured on the paid edge so repeat webhooks don't re-emit.
Churn — a Stripe subscription was deleted; reliably captured server-side even when the cancel happens in the Stripe portal.
Prepaid credit-pack revenue — a Stripe checkout for a credit pack completed; server-only (the browser never sees the webhook).
Agency-side revenue — a client paid a Mercado Pago invoice; captured once on the invoice paid edge (idempotent across webhook + reconciliation sweep).
